heaven-himachal-tour-package.question: Best time to visit Heaven?
heaven-himachal-tour-package.answer: March to June and September to December are ideal.

heaven-himachal-tour-package.question: Is pickup included?
heaven-himachal-tour-package.answer: Yes, from the nearest major airport or station.
